generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST10LX LiDAR providing 3D point cloud data at up to 10 Hz over Wi‑Fi using ROS2."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloud
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera delivering depth images for perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageRaw
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wheel speed sensors measuring vehicle speed for feedback."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedRaw
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensors measuring steering position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleRaw
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor acceleration control."
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo motor adjusting steering angle."
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARRawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LxLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance WheelSpeedRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ClusteredPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARRawPointCloud
]

instance TrackedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ClusteredPointCloud
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DepthImageRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth image data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance WheelSpeedRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw wheel speed data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CPPNodeLifecycle
]

instance SteeringAngleRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CPPNodeLifecycle
]

instance ClusteredPointsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered point cloud for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance TrackedObjectsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracked object positions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrackedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic executing on the DT cloud node."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CPPNodeLifecycle
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN based point cloud clustering for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of object positions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessing, ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataTranslationFEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE aligning data types for transmission."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, Python38Runtime
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling inter-component communication over Wi‑Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance Python38Runtime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime for scripts and data translation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance CPPNodeLifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ lifecycle management for ROS2 nodes."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance SimulinkProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex processing such as point‑cloud clustering."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance JetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration on Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance GitHubRepo : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository (https://github.com/McSCert/Automotive-Digital-Twin) containing source and documentation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance RoboRacerFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open‑source RoboRacer framework for hardware integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

instance OPCUAOptional : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optional OPC UA interface for data translation (example use)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, DataReportingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service providing real‑time UI displaying speed, steering, object tracks, projected path, and report generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehiclePerformanceInsight, SystemHealthInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service executing Adaptive Cruise Control logic on DT cloud node."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEffectivenessInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, trigger emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, ChangeDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service rendering 3‑D representation of vehicle state and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Reporting service storing time‑series logs in external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataReportingInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into vehicle system health derived from monitoring."
]

instance VehiclePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into vehicle performance (speed, steering) from real‑time dashboards."
]

instance ACCEffectivenessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into ACC effectiveness from computation offloading results."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into 3‑D visualisation of vehicle state."
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into data reporting and historical logs."
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable Adaptive Cruise Control."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to disable Adaptive Cruise Control."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ChangeDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to modify the desired speed setting."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Desired speed and steering commands generated by the ACC controller (ISO15622 compliant) are converted by the Actuation FE into motor voltage commands and steering servo signals sent via ROS2 messages over Wi‑Fi to the vehicle; remote enable/disable and emergency braking commands are also transmitted to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with an end‑to‑end network latency requirement of ≤100 ms, clock synchronization accuracy also ≤100 ms; data acquisition and command cycles are performed in real‑time to sustain the ACC control loop."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO23247 entity‑based architecture: Physical Twin Entity (on‑board hardware), Digital Twin Entity (cloud/edge node), User Entity (operator console) – each composed of Functional Entities (Data Translation, Data Collection, Presentation, Reporting, Acceleration Control, Actuation, Visualization, etc.) orchestrated via ROS2 topics/messages over a Wi‑Fi network."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (run‑time) stage— the DT is active during vehicle operation, collecting and processing data, executing control logic, and providing remote management; no explicit design or manufacturing stages are covered in this study."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Critical latency must stay below 100 ms and all device clocks must be synchronized within 100 ms, ensuring real‑time data integrity. The DT operates on a 1/10‑scale vehicle, making the fidelity of sensor data and control signals relative to a full‑size vehicle. Validation is implicit through real‑time monitoring and reporting; the architecture adheres to ISO 23247 and ISO 15622 safety guidelines."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical twin and Digital Twin Entity exchange data over a Wi‑Fi network using ROS 2, which relies on DDS for message transportation. The Data Translation FE serializes and unifies message types; internal component communication also occurs over ROS2 topics. No explicit mention of lower‑level protocols beyond Wi‑Fi and DDS."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Distributed deployment: Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson NX/Nano (on‑board), Digital Twin Entity on a cloud/edge server, User Entity on operator workstation; all connected over Wi‑Fi; ROS2 nodes run on respective hardware platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Architecture guided by ISO 23247 reference architecture; ACC control follows ISO 15622 specification; middleware (ROS2) and optional OPC UA conform to open standards; NVIDIA Jetpack SDK follows NVIDIA platform standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Acknowledged safety-critical nature with low‑latency requirement (≤100 ms); use of ISO standards for control logic; no explicit cybersecurity mechanisms described, but remote operation imposes risk awareness; safety emphasized through compliance with ISO 15622 and real‑time constraints."
]
